source.title: Island Defense — KiasuDash Demo
source.stack: Phaser.js 3 + React 19 + Vite (built-and-committed dist; no source TS in repo)
source.build_artifact: assets/island-defense-vnoha80H.js (1.4 MB minified; no sourcemap committed)
source.secondary_source: https://github.com/chongdashu/phaserjs-tinyswords (cited inspiration; full single-file Phaser source — but it's a different game, 'Castle Clash Duel'). Used only as a code-pattern reference.

player_object.identity: Blue Castle (the protected base) + Test Panel UI for spawning blue troops
player_object.controlled_via: UIKit panel buttons (no avatar, no movement)
player_object.rationale: Blue castle is the asset to defend; player agency is via the test-panel buttons that spawn blue troops

core_loop: AI starts spawning red warriors at intervals per difficulty
Player clicks +1 / +3 / +5 Blue buttons to spawn blue warriors (simulates correct-answer rewards in the KiasuDash quiz integration)
Units march from their respective castle toward the opposing castle
Units engage enemy units / castle on contact; sword SFX plays on hit
Castle HP drops when struck; victory when red HP=0, defeat when blue HP=0
Round transitions show banner; final result triggers Victory or Defeat banner
Player can also use Test Panel buttons to manually trigger banners and victory/defeat for testing

input_model.camera: pinch-zoom (touch) / mouse wheel zoom; drag to pan; +/- keys to zoom
input_model.no_unit_selection: demo doesn't expose unit-level click control; AI handles all targeting

camera_model.kind: screen-space top-down with bounds (world width/height); pan + zoom
camera_model.stem_choice: Phase 1: fixed orthographic top-down. Phase 2: add pan/zoom via custom camera behavior. Documented in FDR-001.

physics_model.stem_choice: no engine physics — manual position tracking + circle-circle distance for unit-vs-unit and unit-vs-castle. Matches math-meteors approach.

audio.stem_choice: import bg_loop + 1 hit SFX + finish + defeat (4 audio assets total). Other SFX deferred to Phase 2.

vfx.in_source: Phaser particle dust on spawn, projectiles, sprite-sheet animations on units
vfx.stem_choice: Phase 1: short-lived UIKit text 'spawn' indicator + entity disappearance on death. Particles deferred.

units.warrior: 192x192 frames; idle 8f, run 6f, attack1 4f (separate PNGs per blue/red, per animation)

stem_assets_plan.images: DEFERRED to Phase 2 — Phase 1 uses UIKit colored containers for all entities. Documented in FDR-002.

fidelity_risks.stem: UIKit colored containers (Phase 1) — sprites + UV-cycled animation deferred
fidelity_risks.mitigation: FDR-002; Phase 2 plan documented in todo

fidelity_risks.source: drag pan + pinch/wheel zoom + key zoom, world bounds

fidelity_risks.mitigation: matches math-meteors approach; no physics behavior change

fidelity_risks.stem: UIKit gradient backgrounds (water = blue, ground = beige)
fidelity_risks.mitigation: Phase 1 stylization; Phase 2 imports tilemap PNGs

fidelity_risks.source: Phaser physics group of arrow sprites
fidelity_risks.stem: Phase 1 omits archer unit; only warriors. Documented in FDR-003
fidelity_risks.mitigation: Phase 2 plan to add archer + arrow primitive
